printed.name: Pelvic Curl
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs bent, hip width apart, feet placed on pedal in Prehensile position (page 27 Foudation Reformer MAWB), pedal pressed down, arms by sides, palms down
cues: Maximize lumbar flexion as pelvis and spine roll up and down
Articulate through each vertebra as spine rolls up and down
Return to neutral spine position after each repetition
